creator: matthewv@pm.me
text:
The installer detects the wifi hardware but will not display any networks that I know are within range. After install and going through the wifi instructions in the handbook (32.3.2) I still get no connection.
sysctl net.wlan.devices returns "net.wlan.devices: iwm0"
The HW probe I performed for the Intel NUC computer is here. 
https://bsd-hardware.info/?probe=c55f468566

The wifi in this particular NUC wasn't suported until FreeBSD 13.0 (You can see here https://bsd-hardware.info/?id=pci:8086-31dc-8086-02a4)
